title: calea sipapoana
intro: Calea sipapoana is a perennial plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant compounds. Calea sipapoana is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. Herbal preparations of Calea sipapoana can be found in tea, tincture, and capsule forms, often used to promote a good night's sleep and improve overall well-being.
